steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The text explicitly states: “Some of the more recent pits were carved on top of older pits. This led Waweru to think that the game was played at the site for a long time.” The observation of pits layered from different time periods is the direct reason for her conclusion.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Pits carved on top of earlier pits show people returned to the site repeatedly across different generations—proof of sustained activity.

The other choices describe observations Waweru made but none of them explain why the game was played for a long time.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
